title: phragmites communis subsp. stenophyllus
intro: Phragmites communis subsp. stenophyllus, also known as Narrow-leaved Cattail or Stenophyllus Cattail, is a type of sedge that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure and alleviating symptoms of bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparations of Phragmites communis subsp. stenophyllus include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
